# AI Unfiltered - Full Article List

> This file contains recent AI news articles for consumption by LLMs and AI agents.
> Updated every 4 hours. Links to original sources.

### UGREEN to Launch Power Banks Using BYD’s New Safety-Standard Battery Cells
- Source: Pandaily
- Category: chinese-ai
- URL: https://pandaily.com/ugreen-to-launch-power-banks-using-byd-s-new-safety-standard-battery-cells
- Summary: UGREEN partnered with BYD Battery to develop power banks using new safety-standard battery cells following China’s updated regulations, which will take effect in 2027. The move focuses on improving safety under extreme conditions.

### MiniMax Open Sources M2.7 Model with Broad Hardware Ecosystem Support
- Source: Pandaily
- Category: chinese-ai
- URL: https://pandaily.com/mini-max-open-sources-m2-7-model-with-broad-hardware-ecosystem-support
- Summary: MiniMax open-sourced its M2.7 model with support from multiple global chipmakers and platforms, aiming to expand adoption in software engineering and AI agent applications. No pricing is involved as the model is open source.

### Geely Unveils i-HEV Hybrid System with 48.4% Thermal Efficiency
- Source: Pandaily
- Category: chinese-ai
- URL: https://pandaily.com/geely-unveils-i-hev-hybrid-system-with-48-4-thermal-efficiency
- Summary: Geely unveiled its i-HEV hybrid system with a thermal efficiency of 48.4% and fuel consumption as low as 2.22L/100km, among the highest for mass-produced engines. The system will be deployed across its core vehicle lineup.
